---
title: "Owen_Work"
author: "Owen Hughes"
date: "2026-03-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

gantt <- tribble(
  ~phase,  ~subtask, ~start, ~end, ~goal, ~deliverable,

  # WP1 — Setup
  "Phase-1", "Attain CBERS-4A Imagery",
  ymd("2026-05-01"), ymd("2026-06-01"),
  "Organize resources.",
  "CBERS-4A data Digital Environment",
  
  "Phase-1", "Initial image analysis",
  ymd("2026-05-01"), ymd("2026-07-01"),
  "Organize resources.",
  "CBERS-4A data Digital Environment",

  "Phase-1", "Link GIS to IMPLURB",
  ymd("2026-06-01"), ymd("2026-07-01"),
  "Organize resources.",
  "CBERS-4A data Digital Environment",

  # WP2 — Construction
  "Phase-2", "Imagery Object creation",
  ymd("2026-07-01"), ymd("2026-08-1"),
  "Create and train model.",
  "Early stage informal housing identification model",

  "Phase-2", "Compute Difference indices",
  ymd("2026-07-15"), ymd("2026-09-01"),
  "Create and train the model.",
  "Early stage informal housing identification model",

  "Phase-2", "Train model",
  ymd("2026-08-01"), ymd("2026-10-01"),
  "Create and train the model.",
  "Early stage informal housing identification model",

  # WP3 — Application
  "Phase-3", "Hire and Train technicians",
  ymd("2026-10-01"), ymd("2026-12-01"),
  "Facilitate cooridination between us, IMPLURB, and Civil Defense",
  "Trained staff & interdepartmental communcication",

  "Phase-3", "Early Warning dashboard",
  ymd("2026-11-01"), ymd("2027-02-01"),
  "Facilitate cooridination between us, IMPLURB, and Civil Defense",
  "Trained staff & interdepartmental communcication",

  "Phase-3", "Automatically alert CD",
  ymd("2026-12-01"), ymd("2027-03-01"),
  "Facilitate cooridination between us, IMPLURB, and Civil Defense",
  "Trained staff & interdepartmental communcication"
)

```


```{r}
#library(tidyverse)
#ibrary(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)

task_order <- c(
  "Attain CBERS-4A Imagery",
  "Initial image analysis",
  "Link GIS to IMPLURB",
  "Imagery Object creation",
  "Compute Difference indices",
  "Train model",
  "Hire and Train technicians",
  "Early Warning dashboard",
  "Automatically alert CD"
)

custom_cols <- c(
  "Phase-1" = "#020E54",
  "Phase-2" = "#A6DEAE",
  "Phase-3" = "#FF700A"
)

gantt <- gantt %>%
  mutate(
    subtask = factor(subtask, levels = rev(task_order))
  )

ggplot(gantt, aes(y = subtask, x = start, xend = end, color = phase)) +
  geom_segment(aes(yend = subtask), linewidth = 6, lineend = "round") +
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_cols) +   # clearer WP separation
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "2 months",
    date_labels = "%b\n%Y"                  # stacked labels for readability
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Manaus Informal Growth
Early Warning System",
    x = "",
    y = NULL,
    color = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "sans", base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 20)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 1, hjust = 0.5, size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )

ggsave("my_plot.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```
```{r}
task_order <- c(
  "Attain CBERS-4A Imagery",
  "Initial image analysis",
  "Link GIS to IMPLURB",
  "Imagery Object creation",
  "Compute Difference indices",
  "Train model",
  "Hire and Train technicians",
  "Early Warning dashboard",
  "Automatically alert CD"
)

custom_cols <- c(
  "Phase-1" = "#020E54",
  "Phase-2" = "#A6DEAE",
  "Phase-3" = "#FF700A"
)

# Ensure gantt exists and reorder factor
gantt <- gantt %>%
  mutate(
    subtask = factor(subtask, levels = rev(task_order))
  )

# Store plot in object p
p <- ggplot(gantt, aes(y = subtask, x = start, xend = end, color = phase)) +
  geom_segment(aes(yend = subtask), linewidth = 6, lineend = "round") +
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_cols) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "2 months",
    date_labels = "%b\n%Y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Manaus Informal Growth\nEarly Warning System",
    x = "",
    y = NULL,
    color = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "sans", base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 20)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(vjust = 1, hjust = 0.5, size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )

# Save the plot
ggsave("gantt.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```
